message:
feat(cgse): add per-family witness artifact directories

- Create artifacts/cgse/witnesses/ with 7 algorithm family subdirs:
  shortest_path, traversal, matching, connectivity, trees, euler, dag
- Add README.md with usage examples for Rust and Python
- Add witness_schema_v1.json with JSON Schema validation

br-franken_networkx-5skc: C7 Per-family witness artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+{
+  "$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
+  "$id": "https://frankennetworkx.dev/schema/cgse/witness_schema_v1.json",
+  "title": "CGSE Complexity Witness",
+  "description": "A per-execution record of tie-break decisions made during algorithm execution",
+  "type": "object",
+  "required": ["n", "m", "dominant_term", "observed_count", "policy", "decision_path_blake3"],
+  "properties": {
+    "n": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of nodes in the input graph"
+    },
+    "m": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of edges in the input graph"
+    },
+    "dominant_term": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "n",
+        "m",
+        "n_plus_m",
+        "n_log_n",
+        "n_plus_m_log_n",
+        "n_m",
+        "n_squared",
+        "n_m_alpha",
+        "m_log_m",
+        "m_log_n"
+      ],
+      "description": "Dominant complexity term symbol"
+    },
+    "observed_count": {
+      "type": "integer",
+      "minimum": 0,
+      "description": "Number of tie-break decisions recorded"
+    },
+    "policy": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "enum": [
+        "lex_min",
+        "lex_max",
+        "insertion_order",
+        "reverse_insertion_order",
+        "weight_then_lex",
+        "lex_then_weight",
+        "deterministic_hash",
+        "degree_min_then_lex",
+        "degree_max_then_lex",
+        "dfs_preorder",
+        "bfs_level_lex",
+        "edge_key_lex"
+      ],
+      "description": "TieBreakPolicy id governing the execution"
+    },
+    "seed": {
+      "type": ["integer", "null"],
+      "description": "Optional RNG seed for randomized algorithms"
+    },
+    "decision_path_blake3": {
+      "type": "string",
+      "pattern": "^[a-f0-9]{64}$",
+      "description": "32-byte Blake3 hash (hex) over ordered tie-break decisions"
+    }
+  },
+  "additionalProperties": false
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+# CGSE Witness Artifacts
+
+Per-algorithm-family complexity witness artifacts. Each execution of a CGSE-instrumented algorithm can emit a `ComplexityWitness` that proves which tie-break decisions were made.
+
+## Directory Structure
+
+```
+witnesses/
+  shortest_path/     # dijkstra, bellman_ford
+  traversal/         # bfs, dfs
+  matching/          # max_weight_matching, min_weight_matching
+  connectivity/      # connected_components, strongly_connected_components
+  trees/             # kruskal, prim
+  euler/             # eulerian_circuit
+  dag/               # topological_sort
+```
+
+## Witness Record Schema
+
+Each witness is a JSON object:
+
+```json
+{
+  "n": 100,
+  "m": 200,
+  "dominant_term": "n_plus_m_log_n",
+  "observed_count": 42,
+  "policy": "weight_then_lex",
+  "seed": null,
+  "decision_path_blake3": "abc123..."
+}
+```
+
+### Fields
+
+- `n`: Number of nodes in the input graph
+- `m`: Number of edges in the input graph  
+- `dominant_term`: Complexity class symbol (e.g., "n_plus_m", "n_m", "m_log_m")
+- `observed_count`: Number of tie-break decisions recorded
+- `policy`: The TieBreakPolicy id governing the execution
+- `seed`: Optional RNG seed for randomized algorithms
+- `decision_path_blake3`: 32-byte Blake3 hash (hex) over ordered tie-break decisions
+
+## Usage
+
+Witnesses can be collected during conformance testing:
+
+```rust
+use fnx_cgse::collect_witnesses;
+
+let (result, witnesses) = collect_witnesses(|| {
+    dijkstra(&graph, "a", "weight")
+});
+
+for w in witnesses {
+    println!("Hash: {}", hex::encode(w.decision_path_blake3));
+}
+```
+
+From Python:
+
+```python
+import franken_networkx as fnx
+
+# Access CGSE metadata
+policy = fnx._fnx.cgse.algorithm_policy("dijkstra")
+print(policy.id())  # "weight_then_lex"
+
+registry = fnx._fnx.cgse.policy_registry()
+print(registry["dijkstra"]["dominant_complexity"])  # "n_plus_m_log_n"
+```
+
+## Witness Verification
+
+Two executions on the same graph with the same policy should produce identical `decision_path_blake3` hashes. Hash mismatches indicate ordering drift.
